### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.DomainServices.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.DomainServices')

## DomainServiceNotFoundException Class

Exception thrown when no domain service is registered for a given tenant and domain\.
Includes the expected config store key pattern for operator guidance\.

```csharp
public class DomainServiceNotFoundException : System.InvalidOperationException
```
